content_body: Gary & Lissa - Wow! From eight months in Iraq and a year of dodging hurricanes, this cabin was like an oasis in a tumultous desert! Daily, we sat out back on the porch swing sipping hot apple cider while watching the breath of God fill the mountains' hiding places. We thank the both of you for providing this haven nestled on this beautiful mountain ridge. We leave with our minds refreshed, our bodies relaxed, and our spirits renewed. We step forward enthusiastically embracing the life we have together! We plan to return.
title: Spirits Renewed in the North Georgia Mountains
